subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that He, verily, is the Single, the One, Who hath proclaimed that there is none other God but Him, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لهو الفرد الواحد الذی نطق انه لا اله الا انا  لعلیم  الحکیم
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @exhortations and counsels
